records.ety: [Gr. kosmitiko`s skilled in decorating, fr. ko`smos order, ornament: cf. F. cosmtique. See Cosmos.]

defs: Imparting or improving beauty, particularly the beauty of the complexion; as, a cosmetical preparation.
quotes: First, robed in white, the nymph intent adores, With head uncovered, the cosmetic powers.
